MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Amanda Hinkle 415-888-5187 Plaintiff in Pro Per. (In-person)
Justin Renge, Esq. 310-424-5252 B&D Law Group for Moving party.

Prior to the hearing the court instructs Mr. Renge to reach out to Mr. Geoulla who signed the declaration on the moving papers. The case will be heard last for Mr. Geoulla's appearance.

9:46am
Hearing is held. Mr. Renge informs the Court Mr. Geoulla is not available and that he is ready to provide any information the court needs. The Court admonishes Mr. Renge. Ms. Amanda Hinkle informs the court she has had no contact with counsel and her address is 833 Bryant Street, Apt. #503, San Francisco CA 94103.

Mr. Brian Stafford, Ms. Hinkle's case manager informs the court Ms. Hinkle was not served with the papers at the corect address. The papers were served at Episcopal Community Services SF, 165 8th street, SF, CA 94103. Mr. Renge gives his direct phone number 310-424-5252 ext. 1096. Parties will talk via Zoom at 3pm today via case manager's email at bstafford@ecs-sf.org

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

B & D Law Group, APLC and Atty. Daniel D. Geoulla's Motion to be Relieved as counsel for Amanda Hinkle.

Denied.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMANDA HINKLE's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Plaintiff's counsel Daniel D. Geoulla and B&D Law Group, APLC's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

Moving Parties seek to be relieved based on a conclusory statement regarding a "[b]reakdown in attorney-client relationship." Such a conclusory statement does not provide a basis for counsel's withdraw. In their declaration in support of the motion, Moving Parties must provide facts and information that would support a finding that the relationship has broken down.

Moving Parties are ordered to submit a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on June 30, 2025. Moving Parties shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Off Calendar
